title: gmelina philippensis
intro: Gmelina philippensis, also known as Yawang or Batu, is a tropical tree species native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gmelina philippensis include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Gmelina philippensis include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health ailments and promote overall well-being.
